headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Blackstone (BX) After Its Recent Share Price Swings?
summary: This article looks at whether Blackstone, at around US$120 a share, still offers value or whether most of the opportunity is already reflected in the price. The focus is squarely on what the current valuation may be indicating. The stock has had a mixed run, with a 6.7% decline over the last 7 days, an 11.4% gain over the last 30 days, and returns of 24.2% decline year to date and 7.5% decline over 1 year. Despite this, it is still showing gains of 47.5% and 59.9% over 3 and 5 years...
